title: Sorbitol Washing Complex Homogenate for Improved DNA Extractions
author: Ashley Jones
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beuvjew6

steps.title: Prepare sorbitol wash solution
steps.instruction: Prepare sorbitol wash solution. Approximately 2x volume of tube capacity will be used per sample. Sample tissue should not exceed 33% of tube capacity. To prepare a 500 mL solution: %s %s Store at 4°C for up to 6 months. DTT or β-Mercaptoethanol will be added freshly when used (below).

steps.title: Grind tissue to a fine powder,...
steps.instruction: Grind tissue to a fine powder, keep frozen with liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Fill the tube capacity with an...
steps.instruction: Fill the tube capacity with an excess of sorbitol wash solution.

steps.title: Add DTT, approximate final concentration of 1 mM
steps.instruction: Add DTT, approximate final concentration of 1 mM. Add 0.15 mg DTT per 1 mL of sorbitol wash. A tiny scoop of powder is sufficient. DTT MW = 154.253. Alternatively add 1% β-Mercaptoethanol (v/v). Add 10 µL of β-Mercaptoethanol per 1 mL of sorbitol wash.

steps.title: Shake, invert and vortex to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Shake, invert and vortex to mix thoroughly. Ensure tissue is in suspension.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5,000 rcf for 5 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5,000 rcf for 5 min at room temperature. Limited based on tubes rupturing if they contain ball bearings. Can also be reduced to 2,500 rcf.

steps.title: Carefully decant the supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully decant the supernatant. Remove as much of the wash solution as possible without losing the pellet. Supernatant should appear slightly cloudy or discoloured light yellow or brown.

steps.title: If the supernatant was turbid, viscous...
steps.instruction: If the supernatant was turbid, viscous or had dark discolouration, repeat the sorbitol wash.

steps.title: If homogenate is not in a tube (i
steps.instruction: If homogenate is not in a tube (i.e. mortar and pestle), transfer to an appropriate sized tube. Homogenate should not exceed 33% of tube capacity.

steps.title: Proceed to a DNA extraction method...
steps.instruction: Proceed to a DNA extraction method of choice by adding lysis buffer to the pellet. Continue protocol as normal.
